mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MEMBER M WHERE 1 = 1
AND (M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND M.STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' )

SELECT M.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, M.EMAIL AS email, M.PHONE AS phone, M.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, M.ADDR1 AS addr1, M.ADDR2 AS addr2, M.GRADE_CD AS gradeCd, M.POINT_BALANCE AS pointBalance, M.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, M.JOIN_DATE AS joinDate, M.LAST_LOGIN_DATE AS lastLoginDate, M.SUSPEND_END_DATE AS suspendEndDate, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' ) THEN 'BIZ' ELSE 'GENERAL' END AS roleType FROM TB_MEMBER M WHERE M.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, SUSPEND_END_DATE = NULL WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}) AS orderCount,
(SELECT NVL(SUM(TO_NUMBER(NVL(PAY_AMOUNT, '0'))), 0) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}) AS totalPayAmount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND (ORDER_STATUS = 'CANCEL' OR CLAIM_TYPE IN ('CANCEL', 'RETURN', 'EXCHANGE'))) AS cancelCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL') AS hospitalResvCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_POST WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'SHARE', 'LIFE') AND STATUS_CD <> 'DELETED') AS postCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_POST_REPORT R JOIN TB_POST P ON R.POST_ID = P.POST_ID WHERE P.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}) AS reportCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MEMBER_COUPON WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND STATUS_CD = 'USED') AS usedCouponCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_FAVORITE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND FAV_TYPE = 'PRODUCT') AS favoriteCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PET WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N') AS petCount,
(SELECT LISTAGG(PET_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PET_ID) FROM TB_PET WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N') AS petNames FROM DUAL

SELECT (SELECT NVL(SUM(TO_NUMBER(NVL(POINT_AMOUNT, '0'))), 0) FROM TB_POINT WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND POINT_TYPE = 'EARN') AS totalEarnPoint,
(SELECT NVL(SUM(TO_NUMBER(NVL(POINT_AMOUNT, '0'))), 0) FROM TB_POINT WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND POINT_TYPE = 'USE') AS totalUsePoint FROM DUAL

SELECT POINT_ID AS pointId, POINT_TYPE AS pointType, TO_NUMBER(NVL(POINT_AMOUNT, '0')) AS pointAmount, TO_NUMBER(NVL(BALANCE_AFTER, '0')) AS balanceAfter, REASON_CD AS reasonCd, REF_ID AS reasonDetail, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_POINT WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY POINT_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POINT ( POINT_ID, MEMBER_NO, POINT_TYPE, POINT_AMOUNT, BALANCE_AFTER, REASON_CD, REF_TYPE, REF_ID, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(POINT_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_POINT), #{memberNo}, #{pointType}, #{pointAmount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{reasonCd}, 'ADMIN', #{reasonDetail}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
mapper.select: SELECT O.ORDER_ID AS orderId, O.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, O.ORDER_STATUS AS orderStatus, TO_NUMBER(NVL(O.PAY_AMOUNT, '0')) AS payAmount, O.ORDER_DATE AS orderDate, (SELECT MIN(I.PRODUCT_NAME) FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM I WHERE I.ORDER_ID = O.ORDER_ID) AS firstProductName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM I WHERE I.ORDER_ID = O.ORDER_ID) AS itemCount FROM TB_ORDER O WHERE O.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY O.ORDER_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT M.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, M.EMAIL AS email, M.PHONE AS phone, M.GRADE_CD AS gradeCd, M.POINT_BALANCE AS pointBalance, M.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, M.JOIN_DATE AS joinDate, M.LAST_LOGIN_DATE AS lastLoginDate, M.SUSPEND_END_DATE AS suspendEndDate, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' ) THEN 'BIZ' ELSE 'GENERAL' END AS roleType FROM TB_MEMBER M WHERE 1 = 1
AND (M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND M.STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' )
ORDER BY M.JOIN_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET STATUS_CD = 'NORMAL', SUSPEND_END_DATE = NULL WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET STATUS_CD = 'NORMAL', SUSPEND_END_DATE = NULL WHERE STATUS_CD = 'SUSPENDED' AND SUSPEND_END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SUSPEND_END_DATE <= SYSDATE

UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET STATUS_CD = 'NORMAL', SUSPEND_END_DATE = NULL WHERE STATUS_CD = 'SUSPENDED' AND MEMBER_NO IN
#{no}
